scripts.lint: pnpm lint:adr && pnpm lint:license && pnpm lint:boundaries && pnpm lint:advisory-drills && pnpm lint:incident-drills && pnpm lint:security-reviews && pnpm lint:docs && pnpm -r lint
scripts.test: pnpm lint:adr && pnpm lint:license && pnpm lint:boundaries && pnpm lint:advisory-drills && pnpm lint:incident-drills && pnpm lint:security-reviews && pnpm lint:docs && pnpm test:adr && pnpm test:license && pnpm test:boundaries && pnpm test:advisory-drills && pnpm test:incident-drills && pnpm test:security-reviews && pnpm test:docs && pnpm test:security-program && pnpm test:community-governance && pnpm test:telemetry-contract && pnpm test:chaos-contract && pnpm test:verification && pnpm -r test
scripts.test:chaos: pnpm --filter @tenantscript/loader test:chaos && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/host-sdk test:chaos && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/control-plane test:chaos
scripts.test:security: pnpm --filter @tenantscript/loader test:security && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/capabilities test:security && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/control-plane test:security && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/proxy test:security && pnpm --filter @tenantscript/admin-ui test:security
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:security && pnpm audit --audit-level high && pnpm format
